title: AnnoMI Counselling Dialogue Annotation
description: Annotation of motivational interviewing counselling dialogues based on the AnnoMI dataset. Annotators label therapist and client utterances for MI techniques (open questions, reflections, affirmations) and client change talk (sustain talk, change talk), with quality ratings for therapeutic interactions.
citation:
